# Theme Card Template

```
THEME (verb-led, customer language):
  <verb> <customer outcome> by <our discriminator>

DISCRIMINATOR (provable, specific):
  <one sentence>

PROOF POINT (contract / cert / metric):
  <citation>

GHOST (competitor weakness implied, optional):
  <one sentence — never name competitor>

HOT BUTTON ADDRESSED (entity_id from workspace):
  customer_priority: <name>
  pain_point: <name> (if applicable)

EVIDENCE TRACE (entities in workspace):
  - past_performance_reference: <name>
  - compliance_artifact: <name>
  - performance_standard: <name>
```

Reject the card if:

- Theme is adjective-noun ("Innovative Solutions")
- Discriminator could be claimed by any major competitor
- Proof point is not in `past_performance_references[]` or `compliance_artifacts[]`
- Hot button does not exist as an entity in the workspace
